meaning: adj.勤勉的,用功的,细心而继续不断的
examples: Meyers is a diligent and prolific worker.
For the future, try to be more diligent in your work.
Such a brilliant and diligent girl! She certainly deserves it.
But no matter how diligent diplomats are, the clocks are also ticking on the other lanes.
Consider the effort to characterize the defense as un-complaining and diligent in its task.
